AddEniIp.eniId: The ID of the elastic network interface
AddEniIp.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string up to 64 characters, see [ClientToken Idempotency](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
AddEniIp.isIpv6: Whether to assign an IPv6 address; true assigns IPv6, false (default) assigns IPv4
AddEniIp.privateIpAddress: The private IP address to add
